title: Fix validator and update agent claiming docs
description: Two parallel fixes: (1) fix MAP_System/scripts/validate_task_graph.py so it does not error when all tasks are DONE (no initially READY task is valid in a completed graph); (2) update MAP_System/AGENTS.md and MAP_System/shared/decisions.md to document the SQLite claiming protocol so agents know to use db/claims.py instead of editing JSON files directly.
acceptance_criteria: validate_task_graph.py passes without error when all tasks are DONE
validate_task_graph.py still catches genuine problems (cycles, missing deps, unknown statuses)
AGENTS.md documents that agents should use db/claims.py to claim tasks once TASK-014 is merged
DEC-009 recorded in shared/decisions.md: SQLite is the claiming coordinator from TASK-014 onward
